query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM newsletter_subscribers WHERE status = 'active') as active_subs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM newsletter_subscribers) as total_subs,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(subscriber_count), 0) FROM subscriber_lists) as sum_list_counts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM list_subscribers) as total_memberships,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT subscriber_id) FROM list_subscribers) as unique_subs_in_lists
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user kmGoXqmAzDGYCHX.75a102e4d6cb --database h57JzrJUFhgVF2g2BrDxyQ --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM newsletter_subscribers WHERE status = 'active') as active_subs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM newsletter_subscribers) as total_subs,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(subscriber_count), 0) FROM subscriber_lists) as sum_list_counts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM list_subscribers) as total_memberships,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT subscriber_id) FROM list_subscribers) as unique_subs_in_lists
